Plaintiff'S Motion To Determine Claim Of Privilege
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Golden Gateway Center's motion to determine claim of privilege is denied. Defendant San Francisco Waterfront Partners II, LLC has not waived its right to claim that the July 26, 2012 memorandum is privileged. All copies of that memorandum in the possession of Golden Gateway Center and its counsel must be destroyed. Golden Gateway Center does not appear to dispute that the memorandum would be privileged. Its contention that possession of that memorandum by Hanson Bridgett firm constitutes a waiver lacks merit. Mr. Snellgrove has provided sufficient evidence establishing that the Hanson Bridgett firm was counsel for SFWP at the time the memorandum was drafted. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk

Both sides submit on the tentative ruling. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO WATERFRONT PARTNERS II, LLC'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Its Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions Against Golden Gateway is GRANTED IN PART. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
